description: Cross-functional project dashboards that unite insights, customer journey mapping, task management, and design review into a single visual command center — enabling teams to align on strategy, track execution, and launch with confidence

templates.name: Launch GTM Overview
templates.description: Comprehensive 2x2 project overview dashboard combining Insights (data and research), Mapping (customer journey flows), Tasks (kanban execution tracking), and Design (wireframes and visual review) into a single cross-functional command center

templates.name: Cross-Functional Dashboard
templates.description: Multi-team coordination board with department swim lanes, shared milestones, dependency mapping, and status reporting for complex product launches involving engineering, marketing, sales, and customer success

templates.name: Insights-Mapping-Tasks Board
templates.description: Three-panel workflow board flowing from research insights through customer journey mapping to actionable task breakdown — connecting the 'why' to the 'what' to the 'how' of product launches

templates.name: Quarterly Review Dashboard
templates.description: End-of-quarter retrospective and forward-planning board with OKR tracking, launch retrospective, metrics review, lessons learned, and next-quarter planning in a structured presentation-ready format
